## 🧩 Feature Description
Describe the feature clearly and concisely.

## 🎯 Objective
What problem does this feature solve?

## 📄 Requirements
- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2
- [ ] Requirement 3

## 🖥️ Affected Pages
(e.g., Home, Feed, Profile, Submit Prompt)

## 🧠 Proposed Solution
Explain how this feature will be implemented.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Feature works as expected
- [ ] UI is consistent with existing design
- [ ] Navigation works correctly

## 📌 Additional Notes
Any extra context or references.
